message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram
    participant mobile
    participant www
    participant endpoint
    participant haproxy
    participant ipfs
    participant postgraphile
    participant CITY
    participant Custom Net
    participant logstash
    participant dApp
    participant postgres
    participant elastic
    participant prometheus
    participant kibana

    note over mobile, www
        sign & send events
        browser ext or mobile wallet
        HTTPS gateway & peer tcp/4001
        User makes deposit / signs entry to trigger events.
    end note

    rect webUI
        sign & send events
        browser ext or mobile wallet
        HTTPS gateway & peer tcp/4001
        /ipfs/{CID}
        HTTPS (oauth by EC Address)
        User makes deposit / signs entry to trigger events.
    end rect

    rect api - Admin/Write api
        /v2 - read/write factom api
        /ipfs/{CID} - readonly gateway
        /graphql - readonly graphql queries
        livefeed log
        index event logs
        dApp specific events
        Query/Sign
        read/write signed factom entries
        sign and dispatch requests
    end rect

    rect dashboard
        dashboard query
        poll()
        Monitor(FA2XXXXXXXX) Balance changes
        HTTP GET /metrics
        HTTP GET /metrics
        dApp specific rollup
        metrics query
        dispatch on-chain event
        dApp specific logging
        pin entry content on IPFS
    end rect

    rect dApp - controller
        pin entry content on IPFS
        dApp specific logging
        dispatch on-chain event
    end rect

    actor mobile
    website www
    endpoint
    haproxy
    ipfs
    postgraphile
    CITY
    Custom Net
    logstash
    dApp
    postgres
    elastic
    prometheus
    kibana

    mobile -> ipfs: sign & send events
    ipfs -> haproxy: /ipfs/{CID}
    haproxy -> ipfs: HTTPS (oauth by EC Address)
    ipfs -> postgraphile: livefeed log
    postgraphile -> ipfs: index event logs
    postgraphile -> ipfs: dApp specific events
    ipfs -> postgraphile: Query/Sign
    postgraphile -> ipfs: read/write signed factom entries
    ipfs -> postgraphile: sign and dispatch requests
    postgraphile -> dashboard: dashboard query
    dashboard -> postgraphile: poll()
    postgraphile -> dashboard: Monitor(FA2XXXXXXXX) Balance changes
    postgraphile -> dashboard: HTTP GET /metrics
    dashboard -> postgraphile: HTTP GET /metrics
    postgraphile -> dashboard: dApp specific rollup
    dashboard -> postgraphile: metrics query
    postgraphile -> dashboard: dispatch on-chain event
    dashboard -> dApp: dApp specific logging
    dApp -> postgraphile: pin entry content on IPFS
    dApp -> postgraphile: dApp specific logging
    dApp -> postgraphile: dispatch on-chain event

    website www -- ipfs: sign & send events
    website www -- haproxy: /ipfs/{CID}
    website www -- ipfs: HTTPS (oauth by EC Address)
    website www -- postgraphile: livefeed log
    website www -- postgraphile: index event logs
    website www -- postgraphile: dApp specific events
    website www -- postgraphile: Query/Sign
    website www -- postgraphile: read/write signed factom entries
    website www -- postgraphile: sign and dispatch requests
    website www -- dashboard: dashboard query
    website www -- dashboard: poll()
    website www -- dashboard: Monitor(FA2XXXXXXXX) Balance changes
    website www -- dashboard: HTTP GET /metrics
    website www -- dashboard: HTTP GET /metrics
    website www -- dashboard: dApp specific rollup
    website www -- dashboard: metrics query
    website www -- dashboard: dispatch on-chain event
    website www -- dApp: dApp specific logging
    website www -- dApp: pin entry content on IPFS
    website www -- dApp: dApp specific logging
    website www -- dApp: dispatch on-chain event

@enduml
